title: Valga, Valga County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Valga, Valga County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Valga is a city in Valga County with a population of 12,000. A unique twin town on the Estonian-Latvian border, seamlessly connected to Valka (Latvia), with a shared history, the Pedele River, and a strong cross-border community.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
